_comment: Ready-to-use JSON-LD templates for CryptoCalk schema improvements. Generated 2026-03-22.

calculator-webpage._comment: Add to EN calculator pages (Layout.astro) and localized pages (LocalizedCalculatorPage.astro). Replace {{PLACEHOLDERS}} with actual values.

organization-with-id._comment: Updated Organization schema with @id for cross-page referencing. Replace the existing Organization block on the homepage.
organization-with-id._note_logo: Create a 200x200 PNG version of the logo at /public/logo-200x200.png. If SVG must stay, keep it but add the PNG as a fallback. Google prefers raster.

website-with-id._comment: Updated WebSite schema with @id. Replace existing WebSite block on homepage.

schema.name: CryptoCalk
schema.description: Free online cryptocurrency calculators: profit & loss, mining profitability, DCA simulator, tax estimator, staking rewards, and 60+ more tools.

site-navigation._comment: Optional: Add to homepage to describe the main category navigation. Place alongside existing homepage schemas.

category-hub-fix._comment: Add dateModified to CollectionPage on category hubs. Wire LAST_UPDATED into the schema.

en-calculator-datemodified-fix._comment: EN calculator pages have hardcoded dateModified. Two approaches to fix:
en-calculator-datemodified-fix.approach_b_layout_level:
// Better: Move WebApplication schema generation into Layout.astro (like BreadcrumbList),
// so EN pages automatically get dynamic dateModified without manual inline JSON-LD.

operating-system-fix._comment: Standardize operatingSystem across all WebApplication schemas.
